name: Erin S.
one_line_review: "This makes responding and organizing reviews so much easier having everything on one platform!"
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

The fact that everything is funneled into one inbox! I love most that we can set up automated responses to a multitude of different situations. We can even have auto notification set up for email.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

It will be nice when Yelp auto-response is integrated. I believe this also extends to Bing as well. I am not currently using all of the features so there is more available.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

We no longer have to have multiple people checking different platforms for reviews, we can now have one person check them and have things auto-forwarded as needed.
